item.title: this is what I woke up to update: they are okay! they drank a lot of water. I left the mess and went to bed, the next morning THEY WERE STILL ROLLING AROUND. they have never do anything like this, they are really well behave cats. #catsoftiktok #catnip #
item.description: By @eleeanor_: this is what I woke up to update: they are okay! they drank a lot of water. I left the mess and went to bed, the next morning THEY WERE STILL ROLLING AROUND. they have never do anything like this, they are really well behave cats. #catsoftiktok #catnip #
